title: Check if Point Is Reachable
titleCn: 判断一个点是否可以到达

testcases.input: targetX = 6, targetY = 9 Output: false Explanation: It is impossible to reach (6,9) from (1,1) using any sequence of moves, so false is returned.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: It is impossible to reach (6,9) from (1,1) using any sequence of moves, so false is returned.

testcases.input: targetX = 4, targetY = 7 Output: true Explanation: You can follow the path (1,1) -> (1,2) -> (1,4) -> (1,8) -> (1,7) -> (2,7) -> (4,7).
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: You can follow the path (1,1) -> (1,2) -> (1,4) -> (1,8) -> (1,7) -> (2,7) -> (4,7).
